LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT A.AE_NUMBER AS "A.AE_NUMBER", A.AE_TYPE AS "A.AE_TYPE", A.DATE_OF_RECEIPT AS "A.DATE_OF_RECEIPT", A.DATE_OF_CREATION AS "A.DATE_OF_CREATION", A.DATE_OF_ISSUE AS "A.DATE_OF_ISSUE", A.AMOUNT_OF_AE AS "A.AMOUNT_OF_AE", A.DEBTOR_OCCUPATION AS "A.DEBTOR_OCCUPATION", A.PAYROLL_NUMBER AS "A.PAYROLL_NUMBER", A.NAMED_EMPLOYER AS "A.NAMED_EMPLOYER", A.AE_FEE AS "A.AE_FEE", A.CAPS_SEQUENCE AS "A.CAPS_SEQUENCE", A.ISSUING_CRT_CODE AS "A.ISSUING_CRT_CODE", A.JUDG_SEQ AS "A.JUDG_SEQ", A.AMOUNT_OF_AE_CURRENCY AS "A.AMOUNT_OF_AE_CURRENCY", A.AE_FEE_CURRENCY AS "A.AE_FEE_CURRENCY", A.CASE_NUMBER AS "A.CASE_NUMBER", A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_COD", A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO", A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE", A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO", A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID AS "A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID", (SELECT DISTINCT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES C, PARTIES P WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND C.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND C.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND C.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID ) AS "PARTY_AGAINST_NAME", (SELECT DISTINCT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES C, PARTIES P WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND C.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND C.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND C.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID ) AS "PARTY_FOR_NAME", (SELECT SUM(F.AMOUNT) FROM FEES_PAID F WHERE F.PROCESS_NUMBER = A.AE_NUMBER) AS "OTHER_FEE", (SELECT SUM(PY.AMOUNT) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = A.AE_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'AE' AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL) AS "TOTAL_FEE", A.ORA_ROWSCN AS "A_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS A WHERE A.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber}
